schema.description: Request body for creating a time off policy

allOf.description: Base Request Objectfor creating or updating a time off policy

name.description: Name of the time off policy

policy_type.description: Type of the time off policy. Currently only "vacation" and "sick" are supported

accrual_method.description: Accrual method of the time off policy

accrual_rate.description: The rate at which the time off hours will accrue for an employee on the policy. Represented as a float, e.g. "40.0".

accrual_rate_unit.description: The number of hours an employee has to work or be paid for to accrue the number of hours set in the accrual rate. Only used for hourly policies (per_hour_paid, per_hour_paid_no_overtime, per_hour_work, per_hour_worked_no_overtime). Represented as a float, e.g. "40.0".

paid_out_on_termination.description: Boolean representing if an employee's accrued time off hours will be paid out on termination

accrual_waiting_period_days.description: Number of days before an employee on the policy will begin accruing time off hours. If accrual_method is per_anniversary_year, per_calendar_year, or unlimited, then accrual_waiting_period_days should be 0.

carryover_limit_hours.description: The max number of hours an employee can carryover from one year to the next. If accrual_method is unlimited, then carryover_limit_hours must be blank.

max_accrual_hours_per_year.description: The max number of hours an employee can accrue in a year. If accrual_method is yearly (per_anniversary_year, per_calendar_year) or unlimited, then max_accrual_hours_per_year must be blank.

max_hours.description: The max number of hours an employee can accrue. If accrual_method is unlimited, then max_hours must be blank.

policy_reset_date.description: The date the policy resets. Format MM-DD

complete.description: boolean representing if a policy has completed configuration

allOf.title: Time-Off-Policy-Request-Base

schema.title: Time-Off-Policy-Request
